process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C. Stored in airtight container over silica gel at 4 °C until further analysis.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirmed amorphous mixture).
notes: 1:2 NAP:CIM crystallized to cimetidine despite highest Tg (40.2 ± 1.1 °C). XRPD peak at 23.5° (cimetidine) detected at all three storage temperatures (4/25/40 °C) by day 33. Exact induction time not reported — only known to be ≤33 days. Storage in desiccator over silica gel (≈0% RH). | [review] Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (silica-desikkaattori), 33 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; 33 d > dry_short_term-rajan (≤30 vrk); merkitty non_standard; Sensurointi: tarkkaa induktioaikaa ei raportoitu, vain havainto päivänä 33 (≤3d ylimittaus puuttuu); t=33 d on yläraja

entry_id: Table 1; Fig. 3; Fig. 5; Section 3.2 (long-term in Supporting Information)
process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C.
detection_methods: XRPD (halo at all storage points); DSC (single Tg = 34.5 ± 0.3 °C); FT-Raman (1:1 sample only — confirmed solid-state interaction between cimetidine imidazole ring and naproxen carboxylic acid via shifts at 1604 cm⁻¹ and 1634 cm⁻¹).
source_table_or_figure: Table 1; Fig. 3; Fig. 5; Section 3.2 (long-term in Supporting Information)
notes: Most stable mixture in the study. Right-censored at 186 days. Tg (34.5 °C) lower than 1:2 sample's Tg (40.2 °C), yet 1:1 is more stable — attributed to 1:1 molecular ion-pair interaction between cimetidine imidazole ring and naproxen carboxylic acid (Raman: shift 1601→1604 cm⁻¹). Gordon–Taylor predicted Tg=10.7 °C; experimental 34.5 °C deviation supports molecular interaction. Storage in silica gel desiccator. | [review] Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (silica), 186 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard
